function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Absolutely — I’ve attached the Helios invoice issued on 2026-01-19 (INV-0008) for your internal approval flow.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email written successfully; verification checklist passes: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity email, no forwarded quote fidelity requirement beyond concise body, subject quoting is valid. Next finalize inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file (already read).
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed oldest inbox item, verified sender identity canonically, verified requested invoice record, created outbound draft with attachment, then deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request workflow.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by preparing a reply draft to Claudia with the requested 2026-01-19 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered lane, used inbox/email/outbox workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email header sender matched Claudia’s canonical primary_contact_email in her cast record, and the requested invoice was confirmed in the finance invoice record with issued_on 2026-01-19 and Helios counterparty. This provided sufficient canonical evidence to complete the resend request safely.
